name: Chicken Vol-au-Vents
recipeIngredient: 2 cups white sauce, prepared as directed
1/2 cup chicken broth, prepared as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the chicken broth and sherry into warm white sauce.
2. Add the cooked, cubed chicken to the mixture.
3. To freeze: Pour the sauce into a freezer container and freeze.
4. Bundle with frozen puff-pastry shells.
5. Prepare by baking pastry shells as directed.
6. Place the frozen sauce in a saucepan and reheat gently on top of the stove, stirring occasionally.
7. If necessary, add 1 tablespoon water or stock.
8. To serve, spoon hot sauce into puff-pastry cases; serve.
Serving Ideas: Ratatouille, Spinach Salad, and French Bread
